# The SEO Rulebook (auto-generated, self-updating)

Corpus: **24709** graded pages · authority-controlled band n = 343 top-3 / 985 challengers. Regenerated every run; verified verdicts come from the audit.

> **No entry is a proven RULE yet.** LEAD = survives authority control (audit-verified or significant). CONFOUND = vanishes at equal authority. WATCH = right direction, not yet significant. GATE = flat floor. A lead becomes a rule only after a controlled live test moves a real page — see [[experiments]].

**Audit-verified leads: 2 · candidates to watch: 4 · confounds ruled out: 8.**

| Factor | Verdict | Basis | Raw gap | Controlled gap | n | If real, do this |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Has freshness date | **LEAD** | high | 4% | 9% | 343 | Show a published/updated date. |
| Internal links to the page | **LEAD** | audit-verified | 2.0 | 8 | 343 | Add internal links pointing at the target page from elsewhere on the site. |
| Query in lead paragraph | **LEAD** | high | 9% | 8% | 343 | Use the query in the opening lines. |
| Topical breadth (keywords the page ranks for) | **LEAD** | audit-verified | 7 | 5 | 309 | Build out the related cluster so the page covers the whole topic, not one term. |
| Contextual (in-content) internal links | **WATCH** | low | -2.5 | -36.5 | 10 | Add internal links from inside the body content (not nav/footer) — the evidence says contextual links carry the value, not raw count. |
| Has FAQ schema | **WATCH** | low | 2% | 2% | 343 | Add an FAQ block with schema. |
| Lists (ul/ol) | **WATCH** | low | 0.0 | -1 | 343 | Add structured lists. |
| Title 40-60 chars (truncation-safe) | **WATCH** | audit-verified | 5% | -2% | 343 | Trim/expand the title into the 40-60 character band. |
| Page speed (mobile LCP) | **GATE** | audit-verified | 93.9 | 509.9 | 26 | — |
| E-E-A-T score | **CONFOUND** | high | 0.0 | 0 | 343 | — |
| Exact query in title | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 9% | 6% | 343 | — |
| Freshness (page age, days) | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | -18 | 26.0 | 157 | — |
| Has author / byline | **CONFOUND** | high | 0% | 13% | 343 | — |
| Keyword density /1k | **CONFOUND** | high | 0.0 | 0.0 | 329 | — |
| Query front-loaded in title | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 6% | 0% | 343 | — |
| Stat / $ density | **CONFOUND** | high | 0.0 | 0 | 343 | — |
| Word count / depth | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 45.0 | 156 | 343 | — |

## The playbook (confirmed leads first — these are what to test live)

1. **Has freshness date** — Show a published/updated date.
2. **Internal links to the page** — Add internal links pointing at the target page from elsewhere on the site.
3. **Query in lead paragraph** — Use the query in the opening lines.
4. **Topical breadth (keywords the page ranks for)** — Build out the related cluster so the page covers the whole topic, not one term.

**Watch list (promising, need more data or an audit):** Contextual (in-content) internal links, Has FAQ schema, Lists (ul/ol), Title 40-60 chars (truncation-safe).

_The authoritative verdicts are set by the six-skeptic `verify-page1-leads` audit and recorded in VERIFIED here + [[findings-log]]. This screen surfaces new candidates between audits._
